caption: A static graphic features a vibrant green and yellow swirling background that resembles fluid paint. Centered in the upper half of the image is a gray square containing a technical diagram of intersecting lines and circles, overlaid with the white text "Fibonacci 24/7". Directly below this square, the name "Larry Pesavento" is printed in a smaller white font. Further down, the words "FIBONACCI 24/7" appear in larger white capital letters, positioned above a blue rectangular button with the white text "SIGN UP". There are no people or physical equipment present in the scene. Across the sequence of frames, the image remains entirely stationary; there is no movement, change in text, or shift in the background pattern, indicating a still promotional slide.
